inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of wall to be covered. Standard construction practice (ASTM C840).

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of wall. Typical residential ceiling height 8-10 ft.

inputs.label: Sheet Width
inputs.businessContext: Standard drywall sheet width. Common sizes: 4 ft (ASTM C1396).

inputs.label: Sheet Length
inputs.businessContext: Standard drywall sheet length. Common sizes: 8, 10, 12 ft.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material waste due to cuts and errors. Industry standard 5-15% (RSMeans).

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for drywall installers. Varies by region (BLS data).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Cost per drywall sheet. Depends on thickness, type (e.g., moisture resistant).

inputs.label: Labor Productivity
inputs.businessContext: Number of sheets installed per hour per worker. Typical 1-3 sheets/hr (RSMeans).

inputs.label: Number of Workers
inputs.businessContext: Crew size for installation. Typically 2-3 workers.

thresholds.laborProductivity: laborProductivity < 1 ? 'Low productivity: consider training or process improvement' : ''

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 15 ? 'Optimize cutting layout to reduce waste' : ''
laborProductivity < 1 ? 'Provide training or use power tools' : ''
